overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character moves from beneath an elevated highway, across wet city streets lined with towering neon buildings, past ground-level storefronts, and finally into a covered pedestrian corridor bathed in intense pink light.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner beneath elevated highway

events.description: turns right to follow the sidewalk curve beneath the overpass
exits the covered area beneath the elevated highway into open street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing a parked yellow sports car

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure overhead with support columns
bright yellow futuristic sports car parked at the curb
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall street lamps with blue-white illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beneath an elevated highway overpass on a rainy night. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk, passing a distinctive yellow sports car parked at the curb. Neon street lights and digital billboards illuminate the scene as the player moves forward and begins to exit the sheltered area under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with towering neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: emerges from shadow of overpass into full neon-lit street illumination
vehicles pass by on the wet multi-lane road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street, approaching a large building with prominent vertical blue neon lights

entered.detail: tall building facade with striking vertical blue neon light strips
tropical vegetation visible along the street edge

segments.scene_description: Moving into the open street, the scene reveals a wide multi-lane road glistening with rain reflections. A massive building with vertical blue neon lighting dominates the left side. The player walks along the wet asphalt as sparse traffic passes by, with palm trees visible in the distance against the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with ground-level shops and parked vehicles

events.description: passes the El Dorado Pawn Shop with its distinctive yellow signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and parked vehicles, approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking away from the camera down the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: storefront with bright yellow signage reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP'
dark armored vehicle parked in front of the pawn shop
red and concrete building exterior with multiple stories

segments.scene_description: The player moves along a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts. The El Dorado Pawn Shop with its distinctive yellow signage and a parked military-style vehicle are prominent on the left. A lone pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the player continues forward past various building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with intense pink neon advertising displays

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically to intense pink and magenta as entering the covered walkway
enters fully enclosed pedestrian corridor with wall-to-wall digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: entering a covered pedestrian walkway bathed in intense pink neon light, following another pedestrian figure

notable_agents.action: walking ahead into the pink-lit corridor, leading the way

entered.detail: enclosed walkway with overhead cover and illuminated ceiling panels
large digital billboards displaying advertisements in vivid pink and magenta hues
large printed murals and posters covering the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian corridor where the lighting shifts dramatically to intense pink and magenta. The enclosed space features wall-to-wall digital advertisements and murals illuminated by colored neon lights. The rain is no longer falling here, and the player follows another pedestrian deeper into the vividly lit walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered concrete of an urban overpass into a vividly saturated neon pedestrian corridor. It begins beneath an elevated highway on a rainy night, passing a yellow sports car as the camera moves forward to exit the sheltered area. As the view opens into the street, the environment shifts to a wide, rain-slicked road dominated by a massive building with vertical blue neon lighting and distant palm trees. The camera then glides along a commercial sidewalk past the yellow signage of the El Dorado Pawn Shop and a military vehicle before turning toward a covered entrance. Finally, the scene transitions into an enclosed walkway where the rain ceases and the lighting shifts dramatically to intense pink and magenta hues amidst wall-to-wall digital advertisements.
